And how do you guys charge?
Yeah, so the way we work is we do a strategy sprint, which is eight weeks, and in that sprint, we're going and publishing, like, week five, we're usually already publishing daily, and in that...
Strategy Sprint is 20,000 total for the eight weeks and you get like all the artifacts, entire like strategy, content strategy and everything else.

And then from there we go into what we call like a growth execution because during that sprint we're figuring out what's your definition of done, what's the right strategy, how do we interview as many people as possible in your space, how do we understand where you are and what the topics to cover and everything else.
And then in the growth execution, like our goal is to try to publish daily, right?
Like so most of our customers are about like 50,000 a month and for most of them we're publishing daily.
So it comes out to like, you know, call it like 10, 20 cents a word, which is pretty much like the lowest you can possibly get.
But then you're getting a super white glove service where you have like, for instance, like our chief content officer ran TechCrunch for 10 years.
Some of our directors, you know, managed like Apple's blog or they ran, you know, Shopify's comms, right?
So you have like really good directors and then managing editors that have done it for like a lot of different publications as well.

So you have like an entire team and then we do design, we stage the content, we publish it, we do all the SEO, we audit your site weekly, we fix anything that's broken on your site, we help like your web team if needed.
And so we're kind of like do it all.
So then you don't have to hire a head of content.
You don't have to hire a bunch of writers.
You don't have to hire an SEO agency.

And hopefully that takes like a huge thing out of, you know, people's like one last thing on their plate that then they can just point us in the right direction or give us like the right input and feedback.
And we're kind of like on autopilot and we meet every week.
So we're just an extension of your team pretty much.
